title: S.A.M Custom Sound
description: A mod-supplied sound effect. S.A.M loads the file with FMOD and appends it onto the engine sound table so it can be played by its "namespace:sound" id via sam_play_sound (or the /sam_playsound test command). The registry is empty in vanilla, so the sound table is byte-identical when no sound mod is loaded.

id.description: Unique id in "namespace:sound" form, e.g. "mymod:boom". Pass this to sam_play_sound.

file.description: Mod-relative path to the sound file (.ogg or .wav), e.g. "sounds/boom.ogg".

loop.description: If true, the sound loops when played (for ambience). Most sound effects leave this false.
